name: memory-claw
description: 100% autonomous multilingual OpenClaw plugin for memory capture and recall via LanceDB + Mistral Embeddings. v2.4.37: CRITICAL FIX - message_sent hook broken (event has no role field), agent_end unreliable. Added 30-second polling fallback that reads session files directly. Comprehensive DEBUG logging added to all hooks to identify what fires.
author: duan78
